microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing compliance workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service product requirements and scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across engineering and security teams.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — synthesizing complex technical architectures into clear stakeholder-facing risk narratives.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model scrutinized by enterprise security and risk teams.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — enabling the team to handle higher deal volume without proportional headcount growth.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation workflows** by conducting user demos and structured training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and establishing a repeatable enablement playbook.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps — translating adversarial technical feedback into prioritized requirements.

Improved data integrity and **retrieval speed by 83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing friction for engineering teams navigating complex technical repositories.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams — directly removing compliance and operational hurdles from the launch pipeline.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce risk exposure tied to inconsistent execution across enterprise deployments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and build a data-backed case for infrastructure investment to enterprise stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — a security-critical cutover requiring rigorous risk assessment and cross-functional sign-off.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual intervention risk in production environments.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process under tight delivery timelines.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, improving data accuracy and auditability across the sales pipeline.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve trust signals with prospective customers.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering a data-backed collateral package that informed quarterly strategy decisions.
